user_id.description: Reference to the CRM user record for the buyer submitting the inquiry.

name.description: Full name of the buyer contact.

email.description: Email address for responding to the sourcing inquiry.

country.description: Country or market where the buyer is located.

product_category.description: Product category or industry the buyer wants to source.

product_details.description: Product specifications, requirements, and sourcing context.

estimated_quantity.description: Estimated order quantity or annual purchasing volume.

target_price.description: Target price or budget range if available.

needed_services.description: Specific sourcing services requested by the buyer.

timeline.description: Expected buying timeline for the sourcing project.

notes.description: Additional notes, risks, or requirements shared by the buyer.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the inquiry was submitted.
